message:
fix(raptorq): Enable all 13 previously-ignored decoder integration tests

The decoder tests were ignored because they didn't include constraint
symbols (LDPC+HDPC) in the received symbols passed to decode(). Now
that the constraint matrix is correct (bd-uix9), add
decoder.constraint_symbols() to each test's received set.

All 153 raptorq tests now pass with 0 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
